fragility_points: Lack of direct Trump-specific XTracker export retrieval during the run.
Final result can move on reply/main-feed classification or deleted-post capture.
key_assumptions: Trump remains in a high-posting regime through the end of the window.
Boundary-sensitive count mechanics still matter for a narrow 100-119 bucket.
Public archive/contextual evidence is directionally representative even if not the settlement source.
main_logical_chain: Trump appears to be in a high-activity posting regime, so 100-119 is plausible.
But this contract resolves on a narrow numeric band with exclusions for replies and special treatment of deleted posts.
XTracker is the governing source, yet direct public auditability of the Trump-specific count was limited in this run.
Therefore the right variant is a confidence haircut versus market, not a strong opposite call.
main_thesis: The market likely has the right direction but is too confident that the final count lands specifically in 100-119 given tracker/platform opacity and rule-sensitive counting mechanics.
quote_anchors: resolution source for this market is the XTracker Post Counter
Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker
source_quality_view: Medium-quality overall: strong governing contract/tracker mechanics, medium auditability of the exact count, and only contextual independence from archive/platform checks.
strongest_disconfirmers: If the Trump-specific XTracker export already shows a stable in-band total near resolution, the market's 81% may be justified or conservative.
strongest_supports: Contract counts main-feed posts, quote posts, and reposts, structurally supporting high totals.
Truth Social page metadata verifies the target account as Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump).
Independent archive/search evidence shows multiple April 3, 2026 original posts and retruths in-window.
timing_relevance: High; this is an intraday pre-resolution view and late-window tracker data could change confidence quickly.
unresolved_ambiguities: Exact live Trump count on XTracker near resolution.
Magnitude of any deleted-post or main-feed classification effects.
what_would_change_view: A direct Trump-specific XTracker export near resolution showing a stable in-band count would move me toward or above market; evidence of adjacent-bucket drift or tracker/platform mismatch would move me lower.
